ensemble.name: ensemble_name
ensemble.documentation: A human-readable name or label for this ensemble.

ensemble.name: value_type
ensemble.documentation: A short code describing what the stored values represent, e.g. 'spiketimes'.

ensemble.name: value_description
ensemble.documentation: Free text describing the meaning and units of the values stored for this ensemble epoch.

ensemble.name: num_neurons
ensemble.documentation: The number of neurons (elements) that make up the ensemble for this epoch. Equal to the number of neuron_id_# dependencies and to the number of columns in the epoch's stored data.

ensemble.name: clocktype
ensemble.documentation: The name of the ndi.time.clocktype in which the stored spike times are expressed (e.g. 'dev_local_time').
